◆ CHECK_STATUS

#define CHECK_STATUS (   func)
Value:
{ \
VL53L1_Error status = func; \
if (status != VL53L1_ERROR_NONE) { \
ROS_WARN("VL53L1X: Error %d on %s", status, STR(func)); \
} \
}
